title: Don't Repeat Yourself 🙉
description: Why typing the same code 100 times is a bad idea.

slides.title: The Problem 🙉
DRY Principle 🌵
slides.content:
## D.R.Y.

In programming, there's a golden rule: **Don't Repeat Yourself**.

If you find yourself copy-pasting code, there is almost always a better way.

The solution is **Loops**.

quizData.question: What does the DRY principle stand for?
quizData.explanation: Don't Repeat Yourself. If you type the same thing multiple times, use a loop or a method instead!
